prompt: Enable 'Three-Finger Drag' for the trackpad. System Settings > Accessibility > Pointer Control > Trackpad Options > toggle 'Use trackpad for dragging' on, and pick 'Three-Finger Drag' style. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings set_three_finger_drag TRUE'` (writes both Apple+Bluetooth trackpad prefs). The eval reads TrackpadThreeFingerDrag and expects 1.
